clinical_information.imaging_results: CT chest (09/04/24, noncontrast): 1.5 cm rounded, spiculated lesion in the left lower lobe; multiple additional small pulmonary nodules up to 5 mm in both lungs; no significant mediastinal or hilar lymphadenopathy; no pleural effusion or pleural thickening. MRI left femur (09/04/24): new irregular mass at prior resection site measuring ~4.0 cm with heterogeneous signal and T2 hyperintense areas consistent with edema/possible necrosis; tumor extends into surrounding soft tissues with irregular margins and adjacent muscle edema; extensive bone marrow edema surrounding the lesion; thickening of surrounding soft tissues consistent with desmoplastic reaction; no new suspicious lesions in the proximal femur or surrounding structures. X‑ray left knee (AP and lateral, 03/01/24): aggressive-appearing lytic lesion in the distal femur ~5 cm with cortical destruction and soft tissue mass extending into the knee joint; periosteal reaction with sunburst pattern; surrounding soft tissues thickened; no significant joint effusion; no evidence of metastatic disease in surrounding bones or soft tissues. MRI findings listed for 03/02/24: no details provided.
